lastUpdatedNote: Added a Security panel to this dashboard summarising the OWASP audit remediation (14 PRs #89–#102: all Criticals + Highs, most Mediums/Lows). Panel reads the new `security` key in this file. ——— Prior: Cleanup-mode evening — PR #86 + #87 merged. PR #86: fix Missed/Overdue counter consistency operator-reported on PR #72 — server's locData.status is 'active' forever (never updated to 'overdue'), so client-side `w.status === 'overdue'` filter always returned 0. New `public/js/modules/ross/v2/workflow-status.js` shared helper (MISSED_DAYS_THRESHOLD + computeDaysLate + isOverdue + isMissed) consumed by both stores AND detectors.js — single source of truth across three surfaces. RossPlaybook/RossActivity stat tiles use dynamic Missed/Overdue label mirroring the home card. 25 new vitest cases including a real-server-shape contract test. PR #87: catalog all 22 ROSS CFs + allowed-fields per mutator in ROSS.md (canonical), with 8-category summary + Source File Map updates in CLOUD_FUNCTIONS_CATALOG.md. Field-verify rule footnote cites PRs #28 / #72 / #86 as negative-confirmations. Automated review caught a forward-reference between in-flight PRs — fixed via 'ships with PR #86' qualifier, then past tense after #86 merged + rebase. Earlier same day: PRs #81 / #82 / #83 / #84 / #85.

sprint.goal: Effective implementation of Hi-Fi v2, with ROSS as the central post-login surface for every subscribed user
sprint.summary: Concierge-first IA. v1 admin tabs reframed as 'Ross's playbook' — the rules and procedures the future AI agent runs against. Phase 5 closed 2026-05-11. Phase 6 FULLY COMPLETE 2026-05-20 (main scope + stretch): all 5 main PRs shipped — PR 1A tier-gating mechanism (#51), PR 1B curated 5/8 starter library (#53), PR 1C locked-card upsell UX (#55), PR 2 day-zero auto-activation (#58), PR 3 Run execution UI (#65), PR 4 concierge home active-run surfacing (#72) — plus Compliance Sweep stretch template (#83) AND the Missed/Overdue counter consistency follow-up (#86). Workflows are the product; v1 modules become workflow step types over time. Two tiers only: Free (full UI + 5 starter templates), All-in (full library). Sprint idle, ready for next pick. Next sprint candidates: Phase 7 askRoss LLM, recurrence-engine gap (logged from PR #72 preview).

recentlyCompleted.title: ROSS Cloud Functions catalog + allowed-fields per mutator — closed backlog item #12. `public/kb/features/ROSS.md#cloud-functions` is now canonical with all 22 functions documented (was 18 — added rossSeedFirstWorkflow, rossManageStaff, rossV2Snooze, rossGetHomeWorkflowDigest). New 'Allowed-fields per mutator' subsection with file:line refs for the 4 server allowedFields constants — would have caught the PR #28 t.id bug at planning time. CLOUD_FUNCTIONS_CATALOG.md gets 8-category summary + Source File Map entries for the 3 missing ross-*.js files. Field-verify rule footnote cites the three negative-confirmation PRs (#28 / #72 / #86). Automated review caught a forward-reference between in-flight PRs (cited workflow-status.js from PR #86 while #86 still open) — fixed via 'ships with PR #86' qualifier then past tense after rebase.

Missed/Overdue counter consistency (PR #72 follow-up) — fix operator-reported inconsistency where home card warned about Missed workflows but Playbook + Activity tabs both said 'Overdue: 0'. Root cause: server's locData.status is 'active' forever and never updated to 'overdue' — w.status === 'overdue' filter always returned 0. New public/js/modules/ross/v2/workflow-status.js shared helper (MISSED_DAYS_THRESHOLD + computeDaysLate + isOverdue + isMissed) consumed by both stores AND detectors.js — single source of truth across three surfaces. RossPlaybook + RossActivity stat tiles use dynamic Missed/Overdue label mirroring the home card. 25 new vitest cases including a real-server-shape contract test that reproduces the operator's exact bug.

Phase 6 stretch — Weekly Compliance Sweep starter template — first end-to-end curated ROSS template exercising Phase 4e.2 per-subtask inputType + inputConfig: 5 subtasks × 4 input types (2× temperature with auto-flag + requiredNote on out-of-range, yes_no, checkbox, text/maxLength 500); tier:free, weekly recurrence, daysBeforeAlert [2,1]; two files (updated seed for fresh deploys + idempotent ross-templates-add-compliance-sweep.js for live prod RTDB matching the PR #51/#58 one-off-script pattern); no CF or client changes — existing rossActivateWorkflow + rossCreateRun paths already honour the contract

7-callable v2-signature sweep — mechanical migration of 7 remaining v1 (data, context) onCall handlers in functions/index.js to v2 (request) per PR #67's canonical pattern: getQMSTierInfo, getQMSUsageStats, validateQMSFeatureAccess, validateQMSWhatsAppIntegration, performanceTest, runSystemOptimization, getSystemMetrics. Each callable: signature swap + context.auth → auth + functions.https.HttpsError → HttpsError + outer-catch re-throw guard (included from the start per 2026-05-15 scope-discipline-inverse lesson — fix-X makes previously-dead validation paths newly reachable). KB catalog synced (both copies). Zero residual v1 references. None on user-facing critical path per PR #67 audit.

WiFi login Hi-Fi v2 (PR 2 of 2) — wifi-login.html rewritten in Hi-Fi tokens with Sparks-only branding; adds single marketingConsent:boolean field to wifiLogins; Meraki redirect flow preserved byte-for-byte (operator guardrail); closes deferred audit findings #5-8 + #11 from PR #73 + offline-queue retry-path gap from the PR #73 review

bugs.title: Recurrence-engine gap: nextDueDate never advances when daily workflow goes uncompleted
bugs.notes: Operator noted on PR #72 preview: 'I see one workflow that hasn't been completed daily since it was created.' rossSubmitResponse auto-completes the run when all required tasks are done but does NOT advance the workflow's nextDueDate for the next cycle. A daily workflow created 10 days ago with no run completed reads as daysLate: 10 instead of rolling forward. Fix needs: (a) on run completion, advance nextDueDate by recurrence period; (b) decide policy when a cycle is fully missed (advance on next 'create run' attempt OR scheduled CF walks every workflow nightly). Touches rossSubmitResponse + possibly rossScheduledReminder. Backlog candidate for a dedicated sprint — recurrence semantics need product input.

bugs.title: Double-seed race on signup retry — rossSeedFirstWorkflow idempotency pre-check is not transactional
bugs.notes: A user double-clicking signup or hitting a network retry could pass the firstWorkflowSeededAt pre-check in both invocations and produce two seeded workflows. Mitigation options: (a) RTDB transaction() on the marker, OR (b) deterministic workflow ID per uid (e.g. seed_{uid}) so duplicate write is overwrite. Exposure small; consequence mild (duplicate workflow, no corruption).
